name: Stuffed Pickled Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash all vegetables thoroughly before chopping; drain peppers.
2. Cut off tops and save; remove seeds and membranes.
3. Cover tops and peppers with water and bring to boiling; boil gently for 10 minutes, or until almost tender.
4. Drain and let cool.
5. Combine chopped vegetables.
6. Mix remaining ingredients; pour over vegetables and mix well.
7. Stuff into peppers; do not pack too tightly. Place top on each pepper.
8. Tie in place with string.
9. Place peppers in a wide-mouthed jar or in a large crock or jar.
10. Heat together in an agate or enamel kettle all of the following ingredients except olive oil: cider vinegar, water, salt, celery seeds, mustard seeds, whole cloves, whole allspice, and cinnamon (broken).
11. Bring spice mixture to boiling; pour over stuffed peppers. Let cool.
12. To each 3 peppers in jar or crock, add about 1/2 cup olive oil. Cover.
13. Let stand in a cool place for 10 days or longer before using.
14. To serve, remove string and drain stuffed peppers.
Note: Use remaining oil and spice mixture in salad dressings or for marinade.
